title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Lido Learning International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Lido Learning International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lido Learning International Enterprises family as a Instructional Designer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lido Learning International Enterprises:
Lido Learning International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning International Enterprises!
